tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; informal.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of ‘avoir’; main verb in the idiomatic construction ‘avoir l’air’.
Definite article elided before a vowel; masculine singular; attaches to ‘air’.
Common noun, masculine; here means ‘appearance/looks’ within ‘avoir l’air’.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicate complement after ‘avoir l’air’.

translations.en: We’re going to get some fresh air outside.
translations.es: Vamos a tomar aire fresco afuera.
translations.de: Wir gehen nach draußen, um frische Luft zu schnappen.
translations.it: Andiamo a prendere una boccata d'aria fuori.
translations.ko: 우리는 밖에 나가서 바람 좀 쐴 거예요.
translations.ru: Мы пойдём на улицу подышать свежим воздухом.
translations.pt: Vamos lá fora respirar um pouco de ar fresco.
translations.he: אנחנו יוצאים החוצה לנשום קצת אוויר צח.
translations.tr: Biraz temiz hava almak için dışarı çıkıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng ta ra ngoài hít thở không khí trong lành.
translations.nl: We gaan naar buiten om wat frisse lucht te halen.
translations.uk: Ми вийдемо надвір подихати свіжим повітрям.
translations.hu: Kimegyünk a szabadba friss levegőt szívni.
translations.hi: हम बाहर ताज़ी हवा लेने जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Idziemy na zewnątrz zaczerpnąć świeżego powietrza.
translations.el: Θα βγούμε έξω να πάρουμε λίγο καθαρό αέρα.
translations.nb: Vi går ut for å få litt frisk luft.
translations.id: Kita akan keluar untuk menghirup udara segar.
translations.sv: Vi går ut för att få lite frisk luft.
translations.ro: Ieșim afară să luăm puțin aer proaspăt.
translations.cs: Jdeme ven nadechnout se čerstvého vzduchu.
translations.da: Vi går udenfor for at få lidt frisk luft.
translations.ja: 外に出て新鮮な空気を吸います.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun functioning as subject; grammatically 3rd person singular.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of ‘aller’ used as a semi-auxiliary to form the near future with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of the semi-auxiliary ‘va’ in the near-future construction.
Definite article elided before a vowel; masculine singular; attaches to ‘air’.
Common noun, masculine; in the idiom ‘prendre l’air’, refers to fresh/outside air.
Adverb of place indicating location outside.

sentences.target: On écoute cet air au café.

translations.fr: On écoute cet air au café.
translations.en: We’re listening to this tune at the café.
translations.es: Estamos escuchando esta canción en el café.
translations.de: Wir hören dieses Lied im Café.
translations.it: Stiamo ascoltando questo brano al bar.
translations.ko: 우리는 카페에서 이 노래를 듣고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在咖啡馆里听这首歌。
translations.yue: 我哋喺咖啡店度聽緊呢首歌。
translations.ru: Мы слушаем эту мелодию в кафе.
translations.pt: Estamos ouvindo esta música no café.
translations.he: אנחנו מקשיבים לשיר הזה בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nghe bản nhạc này ở quán cà phê.
translations.ar: نستمع إلى هذه المقطوعة في المقهى.
translations.nl: We luisteren naar dit liedje in het café.
translations.uk: Ми слухаємо цю мелодію в кафе.
translations.hu: Ezt a dallamot hallgatjuk a kávézóban.
translations.hi: हम कैफ़े में यह धुन सुन रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ακούμε αυτή τη μελωδία στο καφέ.
translations.nb: Vi hører på denne låten på kafeen.
translations.id: Kami sedang mendengarkan lagu ini di kafe.
translations.sv: Vi lyssnar på den här låten på kaféet.
translations.da: Vi lytter til denne sang på caféen.
translations.ja: 私たちはカフェでこの曲を聴いています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun functioning as subject; grammatically 3rd person singular.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of ‘écouter’; transitive verb taking a direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular (form used before vowel sounds); modifies ‘air’.
Common noun, masculine; here denotes a musical tune or melody.
Contraction of the preposition ‘à’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces a prepositional complement.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘au’, referring to the establishment.

translations.en: The air is fresh this morning.
translations.es: El aire está fresco esta mañana.
translations.de: Die Luft ist heute Morgen frisch.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上的空气很清新。
translations.pt: O ar está fresco esta manhã.
translations.vi: Không khí sáng nay thật trong lành.
translations.el: Ο αέρας είναι φρέσκος αυτό το πρωί.
translations.nb: Luften er frisk i dag tidlig.
translations.sv: Luften är frisk i dag på morgonen.
translations.ro: Aerul este proaspăt în această dimineață.
translations.da: Luften er frisk her til morgen.
translations.ja: 今朝は空気がさわやかだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article elided before a vowel; masculine singular; attaches to ‘air’.
Common noun, masculine; here denotes the atmosphere.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of ‘être’; used as a copula linking subject to predicate adjective.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicate adjective describing ‘air’.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘matin’.
Common noun, masculine; temporal complement indicating the time.

jp: On écoute cet air au café.
fr: On écoute cet air au café.
en: We’re going to get some fresh air outside.
We’re listening to this tune at the café.
The air is fresh this morning.
